description: State document, administrative accounts. The right halves of 14 lines are preserved. Mentions someone's servants (wa-ghilmānuhū), half of something, and installments (aqsāṭ). The months Ramaḍān, Dhū l-Ḥijja, and Rabīʿ al-Ākhar are mentioned. On verso there is piyyuṭ. Needs examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
